# [CL-04] Formal proofs cross-walked to RTL

> Plan ID `CL-04` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

🟡 **Partial.** `coq/` and `trios-coq/` directories exist in this
repo. `src/fbb_active_path.v` header cites `FBBActive2.v`. A full
per-gap cross-walk under `docs/EVIDENCE.md` is **not yet committed**.

## Plan

1. Create `docs/EVIDENCE.md`.
2. For each CLARA gap (1..10): cite its `src/*.v` module **and** the
   Coq lemma (under `coq/` or `trios-coq/`) that discharges the
   relevant safety property.
3. Add a CI gate that fails the build if `docs/EVIDENCE.md` references
   a Coq file path that no longer exists.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `docs/EVIDENCE.md` committed with 10 gap → RTL → Coq rows.
- [ ] Each cited Coq file resolves to a real file under `coq/` or
      `trios-coq/`.
- [ ] CI gate enforces path-resolvability.
- [ ] Cross-link added from [`STATUS.md`](../../STATUS.md) and
      [`CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md`](../../CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md).

## R5 honesty

- "Coq proof exists" is **not** "Coq proof discharges the RTL safety
  property". The cross-walk must name the *property* discharged, not
  just point at a `.v` file.
- This issue does **not** assert DARPA CLARA programme acceptance,
  funding, or schedule — only the technical cross-walk artefact.
